description_long: This is an L-shaped executive office desk with integrated cabinetry, featuring a dark brown wood-like top surface and light gray base units. The left section includes a set of three drawers, likely for stationery and file storage, while the right section has a double-door cabinet and an additional drawer above. The desk surface is broad and flat, providing ample workspace, and the cabinetry units are flush with the floor, giving the piece a sturdy, grounded appearance. The handles on the drawers and cabinet doors are simple and metallic, contrasting subtly with the lighter cabinetry. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for professional or administrative environments.
description: L-shaped executive office desk with dark brown top and light gray cabinetry, featuring drawers and a double-door cabinet. Modern, functional design with metallic handles.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the full L-shape, three drawers on the left, and double-door cabinet with a drawer on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the desk and the solid cabinetry base, with no visible drawers or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous back panels of the cabinetry, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the double-door cabinet and drawer, with the broad desk surface extending to the left.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped executive desk with integrated base cabinets
